mapper.sql: request_id, request_type, full_name, email, department_id, existing_user_id, status, requested_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, created_user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO access_request (request_id, request_type, full_name, email, department_id, existing_user_id) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{requestType}, #{fullName}, #{email}, #{departmentId}, #{existingUserId})
